title: JSON viewer component with expandable nodes and copy functionality
purpose: Displays JSON data in an interactive tree view with expand/collapse controls and copy-to-clipboard capability. Used to visualize structured data in a user-friendly format.
module_context: Exports a JsonViewer component that accepts JSON data and displays it with expandable nodes, copy functionality, and accessibility features. Includes a nested JsonNode component for rendering individual data nodes.

steps.content: Initialize the expansion state based on the provided expand depth or default to expanded at root level.
Determine if the current value is an object or array and whether it should show a toggle button.
Render primitive values with appropriate color coding for different types.
For objects and arrays, render the key and opening brace/bracket with toggle button if applicable.
If expanded and not empty, recursively render child nodes with incremented depth.
Render the closing brace/bracket when expanded and not empty.
Attempt to write the formatted JSON string to the clipboard.
Set the copied state to true upon successful copy operation.
Schedule a timeout to reset the copied state after 2 seconds.
IF the copy operation fails, log an error to the console.
Initialize the copied state for tracking copy operation status.
Build the header section with title and copy button.
Render the JSON content area with appropriate styling and overflow handling.
IF the data is empty, display a message indicating no content.
ELSE render the root JsonNode component with initial parameters.
Display footer statistics including key count and maximum depth.
